The question is asking to determine which team(s) finished both first ("champion") and last ("16th") in the past season. Since each row represents a team and the "past season" column indicates their performance, we need to group by the "past season" column to identify teams with both first and last place finishes. We can use the f_group_column(past season) operation to group the teams based on their past season performance to analyze this situation.
The Malavan team finished 16th (last) and the Persepolis team finished as champions (first). Therefore, the answer is that Persepolis finished first and Malavan finished last.

judge_thought:
